content.en:
After waiting for a while, Zhou Tian finally came out of the Temple of Life.

"How's the assessment?"

Ye Tian stepped forward and asked.

"I only passed the third round of assessment!" Zhou Tian said with some loss.

Obviously, he didn't have a good inheritance of the Life Divine Codex.

"This inheritance, you can accept it, and it will be good for you!"

Ye Tian took out the Divine Book of Life.

"This is the supreme inheritance obtained from the Temple of Life, the Divine Book of Life, there are no restrictions, you can accept the content of this inheritance. But I couldn't give it to you originally, and I'm still useful!"

Ye Tiandao.

"This ......"

Zhou Tian was shocked.

When he saw Shizun Ye Tian come out first, he thought that Shizun's assessment results were not very good.

But in the blink of an eye, Ye Tian brought out the supreme inheritance of the Temple of Life.

This shows that Ye Tian passed all the assessments of the Temple of Life very easily, and obtained the supreme inheritance of the Temple of Life, the Divine Book of Life, with the best assessment results!

"Master...... Sure enough, it's still against the sky as always!"

Zhou Tian sighed.

Compared with Ye Tianyi, he is simply too weak and too ordinary.

Zhou Tian did not refuse Ye Tian's proposal, took over the Life Divine Codex, and his consciousness entered the Life Divine Codex, accepting the inheritance content of the Life Divine Codex.

Rumble!!!!

Countless messages poured into Zhou Tian's soul, allowing Zhou Tian to continuously absorb the content of the Life Divine Codex.

"What a mysterious and incomparably mysterious life canon!!"

Sunday was excited.

Although he did not walk the path of life, but the path of the sword, the God of Life also helped him a lot.

Once one makes some progress on the path of life, one's life-preserving ability increases greatly, and life-preserving ability is one of the most important items for a practitioner on the path to becoming a supreme being.

It's like being killed by a master in seconds before Sunday, and even the Terran master didn't have time to rescue, because his life-saving ability was not strong, and he was killed at the slightest aftermath.

Therefore, Zhou Tian also wants to improve his life-saving ability, and the Avenue of Life is undoubtedly an avenue with extremely strong life-saving ability.

Of course.

If he cultivates from the foundation of the Great Dao of Life, Zhou Tian will definitely give up, but if he starts to comprehend directly from the Supreme Inheritance Life Divine Scripture, it will definitely be a step to the sky.

So, the Divine Book of Life has helped him too much!

The only pity is that Zhou Tian's physical strength cannot be improved, so it is difficult to improve the level of life, otherwise the meaning of the Life Divine Code to him will have to be increased by a few more levels.

Of course, just improving your life-saving ability is pretty good!

A long time passed, and Zhou Tian withdrew from the inheritance process of the Life Divine Codex.

"How?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Very good!" Zhou Tian nodded and said: "The Life Divine Code is very mysterious, it is definitely one of the highest inheritances I have encountered, and there are many life secret techniques recorded on it, if you use the sap of the Life Tree and the Ancient Tree of Life to assist, you can definitely practice it the fastest, and then my life-saving ability will rise several levels!"

"Well, the Dao of Life can be involved, but your fundamental Dao is the Dao of the Dao, and the focus of your efforts is also on the Dao Dao, you know?"

Ye Tian reminded.

"Yes, Master!"

Zhou Tian responded seriously.

Ye Tian took back the Life Divine Codex, and immediately returned to the Ancient Tree of Life with Zhou Tian.

"Master, what should I do with the Ancient Tree of Life?"

Zhou Tian asked.

Ye Tian pondered for a moment and said: "The Ancient Tree of Life cannot be moved and taken away, although the Ancient Tree of Life will continue to give birth to the sap of the Tree of Life, but it will take a long time, I suggest using the Ancient Tree of Life and the inheritance here to make a deal with the high-level of the Human Race, you can hand it over, but you must let the Human Race give some benefits." Moreover, you will also need a lot of resources in the future, once you leave the Supreme Hall of the Terrans, it will be difficult to get more resources, everything needs to be on your own, and this time is an opportunity. "

Zhou Tian nodded and said, "Master, this suggestion is good, but if I go to negotiate with the high-level Terran, the high-level of the Terran may not pay attention to me, so please come forward!"

"Okay, then I'll come forward!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Subsequently, Ye Tian and Zhou Tian left this inheritance world and returned to the outside world.

Then, Ye Tian and Zhou Tian secretly returned to the Tianlan Giant City in the Terran Sacred Domain.

Zhou Tian returned to the Supreme Hall of the Terran Race, and Ye Tian found the Kunwu Supreme a few days later.

Among the many supremes of the human race, he is the most familiar with the Kunwu Supreme, and the status of the Kunwu Supreme in the human race is also very high, if he trades with the Kunwu Supreme, he can definitely win the best interests.

......

The supreme hall of the human race, the Kunwu Palace.

When the Kunwu Supreme received Ye Tian's summons, he was immediately a little surprised.

In the past, Ye Tian always came to him for help, or to ask about something, but now Ye Tian said that there was a deal to talk to him.

"Interesting, it seems that Ye Tian has found something good, when he was in the Supreme Hall of the Terran Race, he sought a lot of inheritance against the sky for the Terran Race, but unfortunately he was a member of the Supreme Hall of the Terran at that time, and it was all the opportunity given to him by the Supreme Hall of the Terran Race, he got benefits, and he couldn't talk to the high-level of the Terran about the conditions. Now that he has left the supreme hall of the Terran race, he is qualified to negotiate conditions with the high-level of the Terran race!"

Kunwu Supreme was not angry, which seemed to him to be a very normal thing.

After all, Ye Tian had already left the supreme hall of the human race, and if he selflessly dedicated the opportunity he found to the human race, he would be a fool!

It's like the nine supreme forces of the human race, and the opportunities they find are basically their own, and few of them are shared.

Kunwu Supreme immediately replied to Ye Tian and could talk at any time.

So, three days later.

Ye Tian personally came to the Supreme Hall of the Human Race and met the Kunwu Supreme.

Kungo Temple.

"Ye Tian, what good things have you found this time, if it is a good thing, I can give you some benefits, and I will definitely not let you suffer!" Kun Wu Supreme said with a smile.

Ye Tian said seriously: "Kunwu Supreme, such a thing as the Ancient Tree of Life, does the high-level of the human race want it?"

"What, Ancient Tree of Life!! what you said is true?"

The Kunwu Supreme was shocked and looked at Ye Tian incredulously.

"It's true!" Ye Tian said, and took out a drop of Life Tree sap from the Chaos Ancient Realm.

"This is the sap of the Tree of Life, Kunwu Supreme should recognize it, right?"

Ye Tiandao.

Kunwu Supreme Divine Sense swept away, and immediately judged that this drop of life tree sap was real, and it contained a terrifying breath of life, with his knowledge, it was absolutely impossible to be wrong!

"The value of the Ancient Tree of Life is indeed very high, what do you want?"

Kungo Supreme asked.

"Supreme Kunwu, I'm not done yet. In addition to the Ancient Tree of Life, there is also a Life Divine Dictionary that far surpasses the collection of the human race, which is the supreme inheritance of the life elf clan in a certain cosmic era. In addition, there is also the inheritance place of the Life Elf Clan, the Temple of Life, the combined value of these should be enough to make the Nine Supreme-level forces and the Supreme Hall of the Human Race tempted, right?"

Ye Tiandao.

Kunwu Supreme stared at Ye Tian and said, "Ye Tian, you really surprised me, you are tantamount to giving us the inheritance of a race! I can convene the Supreme Conference, you can also participate, what do you want at that time, you can negotiate with the heads of the nine supreme-level forces, how about it?"

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.
